name: qa new skill
prompt: Run the Skillful RAN QA gate against a newly updated tracked skill before promotion.

name: validator plus hooks
prompt: Check the target skill for schema health, eval coverage, and safe helper hooks.

name: packaging prerequisite
prompt: Generate the QA report that packaging should consume as a promotion gate.

name: dry run qa
prompt: Run the compact safe QA checks for a tracked skill without doing any heavy workflow execution.

name: negative packaging
prompt: Review candidate files under .local/ocudu and promote them into a tracked skill.

name: negative project build
prompt: Build srsRAN Project release_25_10 in the workspace.

name: negative open5gs core
prompt: Bring up the vendored Open5GS core compose stack.

name: negative zmq e2e
prompt: Run the software-only gNB plus Open5GS plus srsUE proof-of-concept lane.
